state_definition: directed graph G=(V,E) with |V|=n and minimum outdegree at least r

transitions.rule: extend a directed path by one admissible outgoing edge
close a path when an edge returns to a prior vertex
classify graph structure that avoids short directed cycles

non_claims: This encoding does not claim to solve the Caccetta-Haggkvist conjecture.
This encoding does not claim local outdegree standing alone proves a short-cycle consequence.
